events.title: Brian May turns 69
events.blurb: Queen guitarist Brian May celebrates his 69th birthday

angles.name: rock royalty
angles.copy: Brian May, the legendary guitarist of Queen, turns 69 today, a man who has been rocking our world for decades

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 73
events.blurb: Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 73rd birthday

angles.name: rock legend
angles.copy: Mick Jagger, the iconic frontman of the Rolling Stones, turns 73 today, still rolling with the best of them

events.title: MTV launched 47 years ago
events.blurb: The first music television channel, MTV, was launched 47 years ago with the Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'

angles.name: music tv revolution
angles.copy: Forty-seven years ago, MTV revolutionized the music industry with its launch, and the Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' was the first video to air

events.title: Oasis release Definitely Maybe 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years ago, which became a critical and commercial success

angles.name: britpop classics
angles.copy: Thirty-two years ago, Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe', an album that helped shape the Britpop movement

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago, featuring performances from legendary artists like Jimi Hendrix and The Who

angles.name: peace and music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, the Woodstock Festival became a cultural phenomenon, a celebration of peace, love, and music that still inspires us today

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis' death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of Elvis Presley's death, the King of Rock and Roll who passed away 49 years ago

angles.name: remembering the king
angles.copy: Forty-nine years ago, the world lost the one and only Elvis Presley, a musical icon who continues to inspire and influence artists to this day

events.title: Tupac Shakur shot 30 years ago
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur was shot 30 years ago in Las Vegas, a tragic event that would change the course of his life and career

angles.name: hip hop legend
angles.copy: Thirty years ago, Tupac Shakur's life was forever changed when he was shot in Las Vegas, an event that would ultimately lead to his tragic death

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix' death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of Jimi Hendrix' death, the legendary guitarist who passed away 57 years ago

angles.name: guitar legend
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, the world lost Jimi Hendrix, a guitar legend who continues to inspire and influence musicians to this day

events.title: Beatles release Abbey Road 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' 57 years ago, featuring some of their most beloved songs

angles.name: beatles classics
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, the Beatles released 'Abbey Road', an album that would become one of the most iconic and influential in music history

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' lead singer Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday

angles.name: rock royalty
angles.copy: Chrissie Hynde, the iconic lead singer of the Pretenders, turns 75 today, a true rock legend with a career spanning decades

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 55
events.blurb: Oasis' lead singer Liam Gallagher celebrates his 55th birthday

angles.name: britpop icon
angles.copy: Liam Gallagher, the iconic lead singer of Oasis, turns 55 today, a true Britpop legend with a voice that defined a generation

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine 51 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic album 'Imagine' 51 years ago, featuring the timeless title track

angles.name: peace and love
angles.copy: Fifty-one years ago, John Lennon released 'Imagine', an album that would become a beacon of peace and love, inspiring generations to come

events.title: Apple released the first iPod 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple released the first iPod 25 years ago, revolutionizing the way we listen to music

angles.name: music revolution
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, Apple released the first iPod, a device that would change the music industry forever, making it easier for us to access and enjoy our favorite songs

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, a celebration of the iconic spy who has been entertaining us for decades

angles.name: bond james bond
angles.copy: It's James Bond Day, a chance to celebrate the suave and sophisticated spy who has been saving the world one martini at a time

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon, the legendary musician and songwriter, would have been 86 today

angles.name: beatles legend
angles.copy: John Lennon, one of the most influential musicians of all time, would have been 86 today, a man who left an indelible mark on the music world

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: Comedy legend John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday

angles.name: comedy icon
angles.copy: John Cleese, the comedy legend behind Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, turns 87 today, a man who has been making us laugh for decades

events.title: Beatles release White Album 58 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic White Album 58 years ago, featuring a diverse range of songs and styles

angles.name: beatles classics
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years ago, the Beatles released the White Album, a groundbreaking work that showcased their innovative spirit and creative genius
